description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel round caseDial style: Silver dial with black handsFeatures: Branding, day and date aperture on the dial, screw to reset timeStrap style: Black genuine leather strap with a tang claspWater resistance: Upto 50 metres suitable for wearing in rain and swimming but not for snorkelling or divingWarranty: 2 years warranty on mechanism only (1 year on battery)
